Emeralds

# Sep 08 2003 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259281078
7 posts
Where is the best place to farm gems in general?
▲ Page top
smithing
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2003 at 10:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254925899
60 posts
The emeralds can be imbued by a druid. The imbued emerald is used in smithing to make an emerald shard which can be used for Fier'Dal fletching (Blessed Mithril Arrows)
▲ Page top
Spell Component
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2002 at 10:14 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758965821
6 posts
This is needed for the level 51 Necromancer spell Sacrifice.
▲ Page top
Useful when Imbued
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 8:12 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762772377
Scholar
46 posts
These are used by Wood Elf and High Elf Tunare Following Smiths and Tailors to make the Fier 'dal (Wood Elf) and Koada'dal (High Elf) smithed items and Mithril Leathers

http://www.eqtraders.com/secrets/recipes_smithing_wood_elf.htm

http://www.eqtraders.com/secrets/recipes_smithing_high_elf.htm

http://www.eqtraders.com/secrets/recipes_tailoring_wood_elf.htm

They can be Imbued by Tunare Druids and Clerics using the Imbue Emerald spell which can be scribed at level 29 and is sold at the Cleric Guild in Felwithe

▲ Page top
Emerald
